message:
fix: add missing table header to markdown summary in run-all-tests.sh (#3396) (#3407)

The Suites section in the markdown report was missing the table header row
and separator, causing markdown renderers to display the results incorrectly.
Added proper table header and emoji status indicators for clearer PASS/FAIL/SKIP
visibility.

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
